description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is clad in light blue siding, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front yard features a driveway leading to a single-car garage, as well as a manicured lawn with several trees and a blossoming shrub. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with additional greenery and a small patio area. The window arrangement is mostly asymmetrical, with a mix of large and small panes distributed across the facade. The main entryway is slightly recessed, accessible via a short walkway, and is flanked by landscaping for added curb appeal.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with blue siding, large windows, a driveway, garage, and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with trees and a blossoming shrub.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long, flat blue facade, side yard, and partial view of the backyard patio and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and more trees, with the back facade featuring several windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the transition from the front to the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a short walkway, no porch, flanked by landscaping and a driveway leading to a single-car garage
